note: P32 on-device inference PoC — desktop reference run (NOT gate evidence: its parity check failed, and desktop is not the Android/iOS edge target). Windows, Edge 150, WebGPU EP. Kept for the thesis's device-class comparison: a laptop GPU runs the same 640 graph at 31.7 ms p50 vs the iPhone's 75 ms (see ondevice_poc_iphone_2026-07-15.json, which is the decisive run and DID pass parity at 1.3 px). Parity failed here only because no person was detected in the single parity frame — desk framing gives head-and-shoulders at threshold (detected_frames 31/50); the iPhone run subsequently proved the pipeline faithful, so this is a framing artifact, not a defect. TRANSCRIPTION CAVEAT: this run's per-frame `samples` array was truncated when the result was copied out of the browser, so it is omitted here rather than partially reproduced; every summary/stage field below is verbatim.
